name: l7_hole_collapse_mode_gate_90
description: Switch to survival strategy when hole count exceeds 90 so the policy prioritizes stabilization over greedy clears in collapse-prone states.
llm_notes: Failure episodes average 99.66 holes vs 75.22 in successes (delta 24.44), while height differs by only 0.41 (20.00 vs 19.59), so a hole-triggered gate should separate collapse trajectories earlier.

name: l7_opening_hole_penalty_0_20
description: Apply stronger hole suppression during the first 20 pieces to prevent early-board damage before midgame.
llm_notes: Failures end after only 23.23 pieces on average with 99.66 holes, and success dissection shows lower outlier early holes (78.8) than baseline early holes (85.7), supporting a longer opening discipline window.

name: l7_surface_volatility_brake_height_gate_80
description: Retain bumpiness control but intensify survival behavior once stack height enters the danger band.
llm_notes: Bumpiness is a major separator (7.92 failure vs 1.44 success, delta 6.48), and level-7 average height is already extreme (19.63), so adding a high-height gate should focus anti-volatility behavior at terminal risk.
